title: Bz1914884 backport
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind failing-test 

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Backport of fixes necessary for RHEL 8.4 gating tests to pass.

#### How to verify it

CI Testing will pass

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=1914884#c57

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

None

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

None
